hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | grep -q 'src/server/routers/session\.ts' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Reminder: review and update the explanatory comment above the implementation you just changed. Comments must explain the WHY — non-obvious decisions such as upsert vs create, soft-delete rationale, confirmed-only booking counts, in-memory vs DB filtering, and flattened response shapes. Keep them accurate and current."}}' || true
